title: Emu/Tern Charge Case battery status
scenario: Verify Charge Case battery level UI behavior on Home screen across various earbud presence and lid states
steps: Open the Charge Case (CC) with both earbuds inside.
Observe the CC battery level UI on the Home screen.
Remove one earbud from the CC while keeping the CC open.
Observe the CC battery level UI on the Home screen.
Remove the second earbud from the CC while keeping the CC open.
Observe the CC battery level UI on the Home screen.
Close the CC with no earbuds inside.
Observe the CC battery level UI on the Home screen.
Place one earbud in the CC and close the CC.
Observe the CC battery level UI on the Home screen.
Place both earbuds in the CC and close the CC.
Observe the CC battery level UI on the Home screen.
expected:
1. When both earbuds are in the CC and the CC is opened: CC battery level is present, green, shows correct percentage, displayed below earbuds' battery levels, centered in the status box.
2. When one earbud is removed from the CC (CC still open): Battery icon greys out and shows the last known battery level (%).
3. When both earbuds are removed from the CC (CC still open): Battery icon greys out and shows the last known battery level (%).
4. When the CC is closed with no earbuds inside: Battery icon greys out and shows the last known battery level (%).
5. When one earbud is placed in the CC and the CC is closed: Battery icon greys out and shows the last known battery level (%).
6. When both earbuds are in the CC and the CC is closed: Battery icon greys out and shows the last known battery level (%).
